title: Registration of ICMP 94001 Pearl Millet Germplasm
abstract: Released in 1996, this pearl millet (Pennisetum glaucum) germplasm line (PI597748) is a mass-selected Cycle-1 bulk of an extra-early-maturing and nearly daylength-insensitive maintainer (B) composite (EEBC) developed for use as a parental germplasm in the breeding of early-maturing maintainer (B) lines of the A1 and A4 CMS systems of pearl millet. EEBC is based on Iniadi germplasm accessions originating from the Togo-Ghana-Benin area of western Africa.
